pricing_note: Indicative UK trade guide prices for online listing; confirm live distributor pricing before large orders. Not manufacturer RRP.

collections.title: Fire Alarm Control Panels
collections.body: Conventional and addressable fire alarm control panels for commercial and multi-occupancy buildings.

collections.title: Smoke Detectors
collections.body: Optical, ionisation and multi-criteria smoke detectors for conventional and addressable loops.

collections.title: Heat Detectors
collections.body: Rate-of-rise and fixed-temperature heat detectors for kitchens, plant rooms and dusty environments.

collections.title: Multi-Sensor Detectors
collections.body: Combined smoke/heat and multi-criteria detection devices.

collections.title: Manual Call Points
collections.body: Red MCP break-glass and resettable call points for conventional and addressable systems.

collections.title: Sounders & Beacons
collections.body: Wall and base sounders, visual alarm devices (VADs) and combined sounder-beacons.

collections.title: Detector Bases & Mounting
collections.body: Standard, diode, isolator and deep bases for detector families.

collections.title: Interfaces & Modules
collections.body: Input/output units, zone monitors, sounder controllers and loop interfaces.

collections.title: Batteries & Power Supplies
collections.body: Sealed lead-acid batteries and 24V power supplies for fire systems.

collections.title: Fire Cable & Accessories
collections.body: Enhanced and standard fire-resistant cable, glands, junctions and ancillaries.

collections.title: Emergency Lighting Products
collections.body: Maintained/non-maintained luminaires, exit signs and test systems.

collections.title: Service Packages
collections.body: Installation, servicing and certification packages from iComply Property Services.
